title: Improving local education about our Unesco world heritage site - Jonathan Davies MP - Jonathan Davies MP
h1: Improving local education about our Unesco world heritage site
meta_description: Serving the people of Mid Derbyshire
text_excerpt: Improving local education about our Unesco world heritage site - Jonathan Davies MP - Jonathan Davies MP Skip to main content Jonathan Davies MP Serving the people of Mid Derbyshire Join Get Involved Donate Home Contact In parliament In the constituency Newsletter Testimonials Frequently Asked Questions Youth Survey Report More Menu 3rd March, 2026 Improving local education about our Unesco world heritage site Jonathan Davies MP chairing the Unesco World Heritage APPG. On Tuesday I chaired another meeting of the parliamentary group on UNESCO World Heritage Sites. The session focused on education and awareness, and what steps we can take to improve local community connection to world heritage sites. We were joined by fantastic speakers from across the UK who shared their experience of delivering educational and cultural events and the benefits these events have on increasing awareness of local history and of the world heritage sites, improving community engagement and encouraging more people to visit. That local education is fundamental to raising the awareness of the values and benefits of world heritages sites and these sites are perfectly placed to deliver an enriching educational experience. I look forward to working on this further over the coming months.
